text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One night, as I'm walking near the pool...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Perfect. No one's swimming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I should be safe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot an Umamusume about to hop into the pool
late at night. Why has she chosen such an odd
time?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whooooa! Is that Taishiiiin?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It appears so, just as I thought.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I didn't tell a soul... What are you two doing here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Well, you haven't been coming to the pool lately!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you have a lot of swimsuits, and we thought it
was weird, so...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Umm... What was the next part again, Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You didn't participate in pool training, yet there
were signs of you washing your swimsuits.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In other words, there was a possibility that you
were going to the pool at night to avoid being
seen by others.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it! Detective Hayahide solves the
case! Got that, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Good job catching me red-handed, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your reasons aside—it's not wise to train so late
at night.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sleeping late is detrimental to your internal clock.
This can lead to a variety of issues such as poor
concentration and high blood pressure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just leave me alone, all right? It's none of your
business.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No waaay! We can't do that! If you're gonna swim, then I'll swim with you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't need you to—wait, when did you change
into your swimsuit?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Seeing as you're both ready to go, I
shall be your coach.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I'm fine on my own. You two should be
asleep by now. Don't force yourself to—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'M READY TO ROCK AND ROOOLLL!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: All right, Ticket. Start!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, come on!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... I'm so sleepy... Blub, blub...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... We're normally sleeping at this time! I'm
becoming... drowsy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: H-help me, Taishiiiin... Gurgle... Splutter...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, I can't hold on. Falling... aslee...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Argh, dammit! I knew this would happen!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you guys not to force yourselves!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin wakes up the failed swimmers and
manages to get them all back to their dorm.
